features.name: Vertex AI Integration
features.description: Seamlessly routes inputs and predictions through the centralized Vertex AI machine learning pipeline.

features.name: Generative AI Grounding
features.description: Grounds LLM prompts and responses using enterprise databases to prevent hallucinated answers.

features.name: Managed API Sandbox
features.description: Executes models and orchestrates reasoning loops in a fully managed sandbox environment.

iamRoles.description: Full access to all Vertex AI and machine learning resources in the project.
Permissions to run models, invoke endpoints, and manage notebook environments.

cliExamples.description: List all deployed AI models in the region
Predict endpoint using custom JSON inputs

features.name: Declarative CI/CD Pipelines
features.description: Define build steps, testing parameters, and deployment targets in declarative configuration files.

features.name: Secret Manager Integration
features.description: Inject secrets and deployment credentials securely during pipeline runtimes without hardcoding values.

features.name: Container & Package Registry
features.description: Securely store compiled artifacts, Docker images, and application libraries in unified registries.

iamRoles.description: Permissions to run builds, manage build execution, and store logs.
Full access to create repositories and manage stored container packages.

cliExamples.description: Submit a local build directory to Cloud Build in the cloud
Configure Docker credential helper for Artifact Registry authentication

features.name: Autoscaling Compute
features.description: Automatically provisions and scales compute instances up or down based on incoming request traffic or resource usage.

features.name: Managed Container Runtimes
features.description: Execute containerized applications in serverless or cluster environments with built-in health checking.

features.name: Persistent Storage Mounting
features.description: Attach high-performance zonal or regional block storage partitions directly to running application hosts.

iamRoles.description: Full access to manage compute instances, VM templates, and local storage.
Full access to create, update, and deploy serverless application services.

cliExamples.description: Create a virtual machine instance in the preferred zone
Deploy container image to managed serverless compute runtime

features.name: Serverless Scaling
features.description: Compute and storage scale independently and dynamically, aligning resources with query volume and table sizing.

features.name: Point-in-Time Recovery
features.description: Enables database rollbacks to any specific microsecond to recover from accidental deletions or corruption.

features.name: IAM Database Authentication
features.description: Bypasses hardcoded database passwords by authenticating clients using their GCP IAM credentials.

iamRoles.description: Full access to BigQuery resources, dataset tables, and query executions.
Full access to Cloud SQL databases, replication configurations, and backups.

cliExamples.description: Run a BigQuery analytical query using the SQL CLI tool
cliExamples.command:
bq query --use_legacy_sql=false \
  'SELECT country, COUNT(*) FROM `my-project.dataset.users` GROUP BY country'

cliExamples.description: List all running managed database instances in the project

features.name: Global Traffic Routing
features.description: Distributes external user requests globally to the nearest healthy application backend for low latency.

features.name: Private Service Ingress
features.description: Access databases, APIs, and cloud services privately over internal VPC networks without exposing public IPs.

features.name: DDoS and Web App Protection
features.description: Shields network-facing endpoints from malicious Layer 7 attacks and Layer 3/4 DDoS floods.

iamRoles.description: Full control to configure subnets, firewalls, load balancers, and routing tables.
Permissions to configure nameservers, DNS zones, and DNSSEC records.

cliExamples.description: Create a new subnet in a specific VPC network
cliExamples.command:
gcloud compute networks subnets create my-subnet \
  --network=my-vpc --region=us-central1 --range=10.0.1.0/24

cliExamples.description: Create a new HA VPN gateway with two routing interfaces

features.name: Least-Privilege Role Governance
features.description: Assign fine-grained, predefined roles to user groups, preventing over-privileged access and audits.

features.name: Cryptographic Key Lifecycle
features.description: Generate, rotate, and disable cryptographic encryption keys used to secure data in other GCP storage services.

features.name: Continuous Vulnerability Scanning
features.description: Real-time threat detection, configuration scanning, and anomaly monitoring in a centralized dashboard.

iamRoles.description: Full control over organization policies, folder structures, and projects.
Permissions to create and manage key rings, key rotations, and KMS policies.

cliExamples.description: Create a new secret in Secret Manager
Create a key ring for cryptographic key storage

features.name: Immutable Backup Vaults
features.description: Write backups to air-gapped, indelible storage vaults to ensure they cannot be modified or deleted by ransomware.

features.name: Incremental-Forever Backups
features.description: Saves network bandwidth by transferring only modified block data after the initial base backup is stored.

features.name: Object Lifecycle Archival
features.description: Automatically moves infrequently accessed data partitions to colder storage tiers to reduce monthly storage costs.

iamRoles.description: Permissions to create backup plans, schedules, and trigger restores.
Full access to manage object storage buckets and lifecycle management rules.

cliExamples.description: Create a storage bucket in a dual-region configuration
Set a lifecycle rule on a bucket using a local configuration JSON file
